articles.title: 美国队击败澳大利亚队晋级世界杯淘汰赛
articles.summary: 周五，美国队摆脱普利西奇缺席的影响，在西雅图以2-0击败澳大利亚队，锁定世界杯淘汰赛席位。
articles.originalTitle: U.S. sees off Australia, advances to WC knockouts
articles.originalSummary: The U.S. shook off the absence of Christian Pulisic to beat Australia 2-0 in Seattle on Friday and clinch a spot in the World Cup knockout rounds.

articles.title: 波特：瑞典对吉克雷斯和伊萨克二人组构成“威胁”
articles.summary: 格雷厄姆·波特警告瑞典队的世界杯对手，锋线组合亚历山大·伊萨克和维克多·吉克雷斯会随着比赛的进行而变得更好。
articles.originalTitle: Potter: Sweden a 'threat' with Gyökeres, Isak duo
articles.originalSummary: Graham Potter has warned Sweden's World Cup opponents that strike-duo Alexander Isak and Viktor Gyökeres will get better as the tournament progresses.

articles.title: 韩国门将失态助墨西哥夺得A组第一
articles.summary: 周四，墨西哥队利用韩国队的防守失误以1-0获胜，成为第一支晋级世界杯淘汰赛的球队。
articles.originalTitle: Korea GK gaffe helps Mexico clinch 1st in Group A
articles.originalSummary: Mexico took advantage of a defensive blunder by South Korea to win 1-0 on Thursday and become the first team to advance to the knockout stage of the FIFA World Cup.

articles.title: 阿吉雷很高兴阿兹特克队在A组获胜后回归
articles.summary: 墨西哥队以1-0击败韩国队，成为第一支晋级世界杯淘汰赛的球队，锁定A组头名位置，并在阿兹台克体育场进行梦幻般的32强比赛。
articles.originalTitle: Aguirre relishes Azteca return after Group A win
articles.originalSummary: Mexico beat South Korea 1-0 to become the first team to advance to the World Cup knockout stage, securing the top spot in Group A and a dream Round of 32 match at the Estadio Azteca.

articles.title: 普利西奇坐了下来，但美国找到了对抗澳大利亚的方法......
articles.summary: 美国国家队周五没有克里斯蒂安·普利西奇，但这并不重要：他们找到了击败澳大利亚队赢得本届世界杯第二场胜利的方法。
articles.originalTitle: Pulisic sits but U.S. finds a way vs. Australia to...
articles.originalSummary: The USMNT was without Christian Pulisic on Friday, but it didn't matter: it found a way to beat Australia for its second win of this World Cup.
